description.overview: Germany's versatile hunting dog, the Deutscher Wachtelhund (German Spaniel) is a passionate hunter and friendly companion. They're rarely kept as pets outside hunting circles.
description.history: The Deutscher Wachtelhund originated in Germany.
description.temperament: Known for being versatile, friendly, determined.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their dense, wavy, medium-length coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Germany's versatile hunting dog, the Deutscher Wachtelhund (German Spaniel) is a passionate hunter and friendly companion. They're rarely kept as pets outside hunting circles.
